name: bench-wiki
description: Read and write BenchAGI canon entries via the /api/v1/wiki endpoints. All calls carry the user's Bench UID for scoping + billing.

tools.name: wiki_canon_read
tools.description: Read approved canon entries. Filters: kind (canon|synthesis|dream), agent, rarity, instanceId. Returns entries with their rarity and approval status.

tools.name: wiki_ingest
tools.description: Ingest a new canon/synthesis/dream entry. Requires title, body, kind, agent, rarity. Goes through classifier + auto-approve gate if enabled.
